title: Update the `grafana-ui` part build recipe to be closer to upstream
summary: The grafana-ui part in rockcraft.yaml cannot run upstream's recommended 'yarn install --immutable' because, inside LXD, yarn 4 fails with EINVAL when a dependency is pinned to a git commit in yarn.lock (e.g. react-data-grid pinned to a commit). The current workaround sed-rewrites that one pinned dep to a tarball URL before 'yarn install'. The issue asks to make the recipe more robust/closer to upstream so it does not break the next time a different dep is pinned to a git commit.
why_good_first_issue: Maintainer-filed, scoped to a single override-build block in one file, with reproduction steps, the exact error, and links to the upstream yarn/LXD bugs. A newcomer comfortable with yarn/Node can generalize the sed hack (or adjust yarn config / use the upstream tarball flow). Honest caveat: root cause touches an LXD kernel-feature discrepancy, so a full fix may be involved; difficulty marked medium rather than trivially easy.
affected_files: 12.4.2/rockcraft.yaml (grafana-ui part override-build); same block in newer version dirs (11.x/12.x)
repro_steps: gh issue view 94 -R canonical/grafana-rock; gh api repos/canonical/grafana-rock/contents/12.4.2/rockcraft.yaml --jq .content | base64 -d | sed -n '36,70p'  (shows the commented-out 'yarn install --immutable' and the sed workaround that rewrites grafana/react-data-grid#<commit> to a github archive tarball before 'yarn install').
repro_result: confirmed-by-inspection: 12.4.2/rockcraft.yaml grafana-ui part comments out '#yarn install --immutable' and instead hardcodes COMMIT=a10c748f40edc538425b458af4e471a8262ec4ed plus a sed rewrite of grafana/react-data-grid#${COMMIT} to a tarball URL, then runs 'yarn install'. This matches issue #94's description that the immutable install fails under LXD on git-commit-pinned deps and the workaround only handles a single pinned dep.
fix_hint: Generalize the rewrite to handle ANY 'github.com/<org>/<repo>#commit=<sha>' or '...#<sha>' entry in yarn.lock/package.json (loop instead of a single hardcoded COMMIT), or switch to yarn's supportedArchitectures/npmRegistryServer config, or follow upstream's tarball-resolution flow. Validate by packing in a Multipass VM (issue notes Multipass succeeds where LXD fails).
notes: Real maintainer issue (no label, 0 comments, unclaimed). Related upstream bugs linked in the issue: lxd#18014 and yarnpkg/berry#3500. The same grafana-ui recipe is duplicated across version dirs, so a robust fix would ideally be applied to the newest ones. Other 3 open issues are auto-generated vulnerability-scan reports.

title: Bump Grafana rock to upstream v13.0.2 (newest dir pins v12.4.2)
summary: The newest version directory in the repo is 12.4.2/, whose rockcraft.yaml builds Grafana from source-tag v12.4.2. Upstream grafana/grafana has since released the v13.x line, with v13.0.2 as the latest stable. A beginner can add a new version directory copying the 12.4.2 layout and bumping version and the two source-tag references to v13.0.2, following the repo's established per-version pattern.
why_good_first_issue: Mechanical change matching an existing pattern (16 version dirs from 9.5.3 to 12.4.2). Mostly copy-the-latest-dir and change version strings; CI/kgoss validates. Definition of done is clear. NOTE: the grafana-ui build (issue #94) may need attention for v13, so the bumper should expect to also adjust the yarn workaround.
repro_steps: gh api repos/canonical/grafana-rock/contents --jq '.[]|select(.type=="dir")|.name'  (newest = 12.4.2); gh api repos/canonical/grafana-rock/contents/12.4.2/rockcraft.yaml --jq .content | base64 -d | grep -E 'version:|source-tag:'; gh api repos/grafana/grafana/releases/latest --jq .tag_name (and tags list).
repro_result: confirmed-by-inspection: 12.4.2/rockcraft.yaml pins version: "12.4.2" and source-tag: v12.4.2 (twice: grafana and grafana-ui parts), and 12.4.2 is the newest version directory; upstream grafana/grafana releases/latest is v13.0.2 (stable tags include v13.0.0/1/2 and v12.4.3/12.4.4), so the rock trails the latest upstream by a major version.
fix_hint: Copy 12.4.2/ to 13.0.2/; set version: "13.0.2" and both source-tag references to v13.0.2; keep base ubuntu@26.04 and license AGPL-3.0. Be prepared to update the grafana-ui yarn workaround per issue #94 since v12+ is where the git-commit-pinned-dep problem appears. A smaller interim bump to v12.4.4 (same minor line) is also possible. Validate with CI/kgoss.
notes: An update.yaml automation exists to raise version-bump PRs, but the newest dir is still 12.4.2 while v13 is out. This bump is coupled to issue #94 (grafana-ui recipe), so it is slightly less trivial than a pure tag bump.
